output.summary: Order-7 byte N-gram cache with entropy-adaptive alpha interpolates CPU cache logps with GPU logits, replacing TTT while the base model uses GPTQ-lite int6 plus EMA+SWA.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training uses standard track data; no validation-only regime was employed.
techniques: Entropy-adaptive alpha scales cache weight by per-token NLL
CPU-based N-gram cache runs concurrently with GPU sliding-window eval
Base stack couples GPTQ-lite int6 quantization with EMA(0.997)+SWA(50)
